# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: your-nodejs-microservice-name
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: your-nodejs-microservice-label
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: your-nodejs-microservice-label
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: your-nodejs-microservice-container
        image: node:12
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        env:
        - name: MONGODB_HOST
          value: mongodb://mongodb.default.svc.cluster.local:27017/your-database-name
        command: ["/bin/sh"]
        args: ["-c", "npm start"]
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: your-nodejs-microservice-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: your-nodejs-microservice-label
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
